inputs.competitor_data: Confluence: Atlassian product, enterprise wiki, 60000 customers, priced at 5.75 per user. Coda: Series D startup, docs plus tables plus automation, growing in mid-market. Slite: Series A, async-first knowledge base for remote teams. Clickup Docs: part of Clickup project management suite, bundled free with PM tool.
inputs.industry_context: Productivity software and knowledge management for teams
